title: Nightbox LLC — News
description: First-in-class chimeric NKG2D-LIF6 gene therapy for solid tumor oncology. News and announcements from Nightbox LLC.

items.title: Nightbox LLC Initiates Provisional Patent Filing for Chimeric NKG2D-LIF6 Receptor-Effector Construct
items.content_text: Nightbox LLC has initiated provisional patent filing on the NKG2D-LIF6 chimeric receptor-effector construct, a 2,123 bp single-construct AAV9 gene therapy for solid tumor oncology.

items.title: Nightbox LLC Completes In Silico Validation of NKG2D-LIF6 Chimera
items.content_text: In silico package complete: AlphaFold + Rosetta structural validation passed; PK-PD model predicts approximately 99% TGI ceiling on syngeneic CRC models; 1.4 x 10^3 tumor-to-healthy selectivity ratio; freedom-to-operate clean.

items.title: Nightbox LLC Founded
items.content_text: Nightbox LLC, a Wyoming-incorporated, Los Angeles operating computational biology and gene therapy company, was founded by Artem Shakin to develop single-construct chimeric receptor-effector gene therapies for solid tumor oncology.
